commands.review_summary:
The PR wires model-call input/output content into diagnostics private data and diagnostics-otel export when `diagnostics.otel.captureContent` is enabled, with SDK export and regression-test updates.

PR surface: Source +150, Tests +514, Generated 0. Total +664 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection and the related report show the documented OTEL content-capture fields are not populated by current main for the model-call path; I did not run a live repro in this read-only review. The PR body also supplies after-fix backend output for the intended behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blockers are narrow, code-level repairs with clear regression tests and no required product decision if the current SDK shape is preserved.
